reasoning: Maneb is a manganese ethylene bisdithiocarbamate fungicide, formed from the coordination of manganese with the dithiocarbamate groups of ethylenebis(dithiocarbamic acid), placing it firmly in the ethylene bisdithiocarbamate subgroup. Its core organic scaffold is a dithiocarbamate derivative, classifying it under organosulfur compounds and specifically dithiocarbamic acids and derivatives.
